---
title: "Nick Anderson"
pagetitle: "Nick Anderson — Economics Research"
theme: null
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: ["_head.html", "_meta_index.html"]
      after_body: _after_body.html
---

Welcome to my research hosting site. I am an economics PhD candidate at The New School for Social Research.

<div class="ark-triad" role="navigation" aria-label="My code, data, and outputs">
  <a class="ark-triad-item" href="https://files.heterodata.org"><span class="ark-triad-k">My data</span><span class="ark-triad-v">files.heterodata.org</span></a>
  <a class="ark-triad-item" href="https://github.com/andenick"><span class="ark-triad-k">My code</span><span class="ark-triad-v">github.com/andenick</span></a>
  <a class="ark-triad-item" href="https://heterodata.org"><span class="ark-triad-k">My results</span><span class="ark-triad-v">heterodata.org</span></a>
</div>

# **Welcome, here are some projects of mine**

<h2 style="text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid; padding-bottom: 0.35rem; opacity: 0.9;">Projects</h2>

### [Research](research.html)

My empirical work on public finance and data.

### [Heterodata](https://heterodata.org)

The research-data platform: a hub of interactive data sites including **Gerhard** (US public finance, [gerhard.heterodata.org](https://gerhard.heterodata.org)), **Shaikh Data** ([shaikh.heterodata.org](https://shaikh.heterodata.org) — replications of Anwar Shaikh's *Capitalism* and *Measuring the Wealth of Nations*), **Lewis** (international economics, [lewis.heterodata.org](https://lewis.heterodata.org)), **Leonid** (Soviet statistics, [leonid.heterodata.org](https://leonid.heterodata.org)), **Leontief** (US input–output, [leontief.heterodata.org](https://leontief.heterodata.org)), and **StarCruiser** (US employment and inflation, [starcruiser.heterodata.org](https://starcruiser.heterodata.org)), plus affiliated standalone sites: [freenic.org](https://freenic.org) (banking data), [foodberg.org](https://foodberg.org) (food prices), [hmdaexplore.com](https://hmdaexplore.com) (mortgage lending), [methodex.fyi](https://methodex.fyi) (statistical methodology), and [jjmuni.com](https://jjmuni.com) (municipal pedestrian infrastructure). Data downloads across the ecosystem are gathered at [files.heterodata.org](https://files.heterodata.org) and indexed on the hub's [data page](https://heterodata.org/data).

### [Economics at the New School](tnse.html)

A three-part institutional and intellectual history of The New School's economics department. A 121-page draft of Part 1 is available on request.

### [AI Tools](aitools.html)

The open-source research tooling I built for AI-assisted empirical economics, with links to the GitHub repositories.

### HMDA Explore

An interactive explorer over Home Mortgage Disclosure Act data, in two versions side by side:

- [andenick.shinyapps.io/HMDAExplore](https://andenick.shinyapps.io/HMDAExplore/) — the earlier interactive draft (R-Shiny; slower to start).
- [hmdaexplore.com](https://hmdaexplore.com) — the actively developed web version.

---

Thank you and let me know if you have any questions!

Nick

---

Last compiled: `r Sys.Date()`
